systems.name: Mediation Pipeline & Lifecycle System
systems.description: Live tracking of booked mediations across lifecycle phases (MDRL signed → data demand → brief → mediator's proposal → settlement) with cancellation-countdown alerts; scheduled Monday lifecycle tracker; scheduled reconciliation against authoritative case roster.

systems.name: Mediation Drafting Suite
systems.description: Auto-drafts plaintiffs' confidential mediation briefs (mediator-specific formatting), pre-mediation informal discovery letters, responses to mediator questionnaires, and joint stipulations to stay pending mediation.

systems.name: Day-of-Mediation Strategy & Orchestration
systems.description: Morning-of-mediation dashboard processing Usher's spreadsheet, Berger analysis, and mediation brief into exposure percentages, work-week breakdowns, target zones, walk-away numbers, and opening-number recommendations using Jonathan's encoded negotiation logic.

systems.name: Mediation Report / Burger Recreation
systems.description: Automated recreation of the Burger exposure report. From Saim's March 13 initiative list.

systems.name: Discovery Operations
systems.description: Firm-wide tracking of discovery deadlines, response due dates, M&C deadlines, MTC filing deadlines, and deposition notices with scheduled Outlook sync; auto-detection of PAGA companion cases and deadline extensions.

systems.name: Discovery Propounding Suite
systems.description: Drafts Requests for Production, Special Interrogatories (Class Cert, Arbitration, PAGA sets), Belaire-West notices, and transmittal cover letters.

systems.name: MTC Filing Package
systems.description: Complete motion-to-compel filing package with cross-reference resolution across documents: M&C letter with auto-reconstructed chronology, Separate Statement of Items in Dispute, MPA, supporting Declaration, orchestrator chaining the package.

systems.name: Discovery Analysis & Chronology
systems.description: Deficiency analysis of defendants' responses flagging scope gaps, false responses, and conduct-vs-response contradictions; full discovery history reconstructed from Outlook as a dated chronology.

systems.name: Class Member Outreach
systems.description: Web-based tracker (case-connections.lovable.app, Supabase backend) for witness and class-member contact campaigns; bulk-ingestion skill for contact lists from spreadsheets, images, or emails.

systems.name: Intake Capture (Desktop App + Browser Extension)
systems.description: Windows desktop app listening to RingCentral calls with real-time transcription, coaching tips, follow-up prompts, and intake-call scoring; paired browser extension auto-fills Lead Docket and allows intake-specialist review.

systems.name: New Matter Onboarding
systems.description: Parses launch-team transition memos, extracts case fields, auto-generates Set One discovery documents, creates Discovery Tracker entry, registers the matter across firm dashboards.

systems.name: RingCentral Transfer Reconciler
systems.description: Daily scan for transferred calls where caller ID reflects the receptionist's line rather than the client's number; fuzzy-matches call notes against active-case roster and Outreach Tracker.

systems.name: Intake Bot
systems.description: General-purpose intake automation from Saim's March 13 list. Relationship to Omri's Intake Capture to be clarified.

systems.name: Precision Vetting Bot
systems.description: Vetting automation for the Precision brand.

systems.name: AI Voice Agent for Reception (Precision)
systems.description: Voice agent handling reception for the Precision brand.

systems.name: Scraping for Misclassification Cases
systems.description: Automated discovery of misclassification cases from public sources. Partial overlap with multi-state expansion discussion (hypotheticals).

systems.name: Case Command Center Stack
systems.description: Active-case rollup dashboard surfacing hearings, mediation dates, defense counsel, last client contact, motion status, and deadline cross-references; Mission Control landing page; scheduled syncs M/Tu/Th; integrity-audit check.

systems.name: Deadline & Hearing Monitoring
systems.description: Daily (M-F) scans for motion deadlines, hearing dates, tentative rulings, and outcomes; separate monitoring of CMC, ISC, IDC, and status-conference hearings plus filing deadlines.

systems.name: Competing Cases Intelligence
systems.description: Pre-JPA intelligence tracking dingers (Asher's alert emails), BDC Topfile activity, and competing filings by other firms; scheduled M/W/F sync.

systems.name: Daily Operations Layer
systems.description: Morning briefing across all active matters, overnight task-failure alarms, pre-flight connector probe, and post-deploy dashboard diagnostic.

systems.name: FileVine Bridge
systems.description: Writes computed case data into seven FileVine custom fields via browser automation; hourly after-hours sync of Client Communication entries; read-only retrieval of case data from FileVine.

systems.name: Pick-Off Detection & Response
systems.description: Scans active cases for pre-certification employer settlement campaigns targeting putative class members with persistent Supabase log; drafts curative-notice arguments and regulate-communications motion material.

systems.name: External Data Handling
systems.description: Downloads email attachments from Outlook into case folders via Microsoft Graph API; detects settlement confirmations in email and auto-closes matters with recovery tracking.

systems.name: OOO Handoff Generator
systems.description: Self-contained HTML command center produced for any attorney going out of office; includes daily briefings, task checklists, message board, case-status tracker, and interactive chatbot trained on the absent attorney's case context.

systems.name: Calendar Dashboard (Milana → Outlook Sync)
systems.description: Dashboard syncing Milana calendar to Outlook and generating alerts for missed calendaring obligations.

systems.name: Attorney Case Time Tracking
systems.description: Time-tracking skill from Saim's March 13 list.

systems.name: FileVine Docs Desktop Access
systems.description: Desktop-based FileVine document access from Saim's March 13 list.

systems.name: Template Generator
systems.description: Web app at template-generator-delta.vercel.app drafting M&C letters, MDRLs, and other firm templates from input data. API or headless mode requested as the integration seam.

systems.name: General-Purpose Drafting Engine
systems.description: Generic drafting wrapper for any California employment litigation document; tracked-change redlines with margin comments for team-member draft review; SWOT-style brief analysis; routine outbound email drafting; POS; CMC/ISC/IDC joint statements.

systems.name: Motion Practice Suite
systems.description: MTCA opposition filing package; arbitration-agreement analysis with unconscionability scoring; oral-argument prep; pick-off response; early case evaluation internal strategy memos.

systems.name: Document Drafting Skills for Precision
systems.description: No Contact Letter, Drop Letter, and Check Cover Letter for the Precision brand. From Saim's March 13 list.

systems.name: Dollar Tree Document Dashboard
systems.description: Purpose-built dashboard capturing and retrieving approximately 90,000 documents produced in the Dollar Tree litigation. Candidate for generalization as a reusable firm capability.

systems.name: Legal Research Infrastructure
systems.description: Two-mode research layer: authority search + Protege prompt drafting via Claude in Chrome + LexisNexis; citation verification; judicial research with Lexis Context Reports and strike-list cross-reference.

systems.name: Reference Layer
systems.description: Substantive and procedural reference skills providing background legal logic for wage-hour analysis and civil procedure. Not directly citable but persuasive analytical scaffolding.

systems.name: Data Audit & Verification
systems.description: Ferra-compliant meal/rest premium rate audit; cross-reference of client cheat sheets against time and payroll records; Eve output logic verification; firm-wide source-fidelity guardrail against fabricated quoted text.

systems.name: Arbitration Research Bot
systems.description: Research bot using the Trellis API and CourtListener for arbitration-related authority. Potential complement to Ryan's Arbitration Analysis skill.

systems.name: Memory System
systems.description: Two-tier memory with working-memory CLAUDE.md and long-term store; sleep-time consolidation agent processing recent sessions and Granola notes overnight; firm-specific glossary decoding case names, opposing counsel, mediator preferences, nicknames.

systems.name: Drafts Registry
systems.description: Shared helper logging auto-generated drafts to the firm artifact registry so drafts appear on case cards and in the Daily Operations Layer's 'Awaiting Your Send' section.

systems.name: Blackstone AI Platform
systems.description: Custom platform initially replacing Lead Docket, with scope expanding to replace EvenFiled and FileVine — targeting roughly summer 2026. Convergence target for the rest of the portfolio.

systems.name: Jon Bot
systems.description: Listed on Saim's March 13 concept list. Distinct from the JohnBot real-time mediation tracker concept; relationship to be clarified.

systems.name: Firm Dashboard Infrastructure (Railway + GitHub)
systems.description: Railway hosting + GitHub repositories powering all production firm dashboards and the skill stack; auto-deploys via GitHub push. The substrate on which most of the portfolio runs.

systems.name: Outreach Tracker Backend (Supabase)
systems.description: Supabase data layer powering case-connections.lovable.app.

systems.name: JohnBot — Real-Time Mediation Tracker
systems.description: Real-time mediation tracking enabling the managing partner to monitor multiple simultaneous mediations remotely — Teams notifications at inflection moments, live negotiation state, strategic input without physical presence. Extension of Day-of-Mediation dashboard.

systems.name: Real-Time Mediation AI Listener
systems.description: Extension of Day-of-Mediation Strategy dashboard to listen to mediation audio and suggest argument moves in real time (e.g., Sage-style employee-handbook unlocks).

systems.name: Institutional Knowledge Retrieval Layer
systems.description: Cross-matter query layer enabling questions like 'has this defense attorney made this argument in a prior Blackstone case?' Jeremy flagged April 16 as most important missing capability.

systems.name: External Legal Research Direct-Feed Integration
systems.description: Direct ingestion of LexisNexis and Westlaw authority into real-time mediation and motion-practice systems.

systems.name: Multi-State Expansion Infrastructure
systems.description: Tooling for WA/OR/IL/NY expansion — pro hac vice, emerging-market scraping, local-counsel coordination, out-of-state mediator pool development.

systems.name: Unified Firm Note-Taking Layer
systems.description: Internal replacement for Granola/Fyxer/etc. within Blackstone AI. Jeremy noted Omri has contemplated this.

systems.name: Real-Time Defendant Financial Analysis
systems.description: Analysis of defendant financial documents with predictive argument preparation. Jeremy described the manual pattern April 16.

systems.name: Dollar Tree Document Dashboard Pattern Generalization
systems.description: Dollar Tree dashboard pattern as a reusable firm capability for any large-document-production case.

systems.name: Template Generator Sub-Agent Integration
systems.description: Ryan's drafting systems invoking Doran's Template Generator via API rather than maintaining parallel logic. Decision pending.

systems.name: Cross-Case Pattern Recognition
systems.description: Pattern-recognition layer automatically detecting when facts in a new matter echo facts in a prior firm case — without requiring an explicit query.

overlaps.title: Template Generation
overlaps.description: JD/Doron's Template Generator overlaps in scope with Ryan's drafting systems. Resolution: expose API, use as sub-agent.

overlaps.title: Calendar and Operations Dashboards
overlaps.description: JD + Saim's Calendar Dashboard overlaps with Command Center and Deadline & Hearing Monitoring. Coordination recommended before either hardens.

overlaps.title: Intake Automation
overlaps.description: Omri's Intake Capture overlaps in scope with Saim's Intake Bot. Omri's implementation further along; consolidation or role differentiation needed.

overlaps.title: Arbitration Research and Analysis
overlaps.description: Saim's Arbitration Research Bot and Ryan's Arbitration Analysis skill approach the same space. Combined flow would be stronger.

gaps.title: Real-Time Mediation Intelligence
gaps.description: Day-of-Mediation Strategy dashboard is pre-event only. No live-update or in-room suggestion layer.

gaps.title: Firm-Wide Institutional Knowledge Retrieval
gaps.description: Case history, defendant history, OC history, and argument patterns not queryable across matters. Jeremy flagged as most important missing capability.

gaps.title: Adoption Measurement
gaps.description: No AI-usage metrics capturing who is using which tools, how often, with what results. Adoption gradient unmeasured.

gaps.title: Multi-State Infrastructure
gaps.description: No tooling for out-of-state matter handling — pro hac vice, local-counsel coordination, emerging-market scraping, out-of-state mediator pool.

architectural_seams.title: Project-Registry API
architectural_seams.description: Shared data model for what the firm is building. Could be powered by the coordination framework's source of truth.

architectural_seams.title: Document Output Channel
architectural_seams.description: Standardized .docx generation hook consumed by all drafting systems.

architectural_seams.title: Case-Context API
architectural_seams.description: Shared case-data layer that drafting, mediation, research, and operations systems consume. Currently served by Memory System.

architectural_seams.title: Memory / Institutional-Knowledge API
architectural_seams.description: Cross-matter knowledge layer. Addresses the institutional-knowledge retrieval gap.
